person_name: Titus Quinctius Flamininus, Roman general and consul (c. 229–174 BCE)
person_name_full: Titus Quinctius Flamininus, Roman general and consul (c. 229–174 BCE)
notes: Roman general and consul known for his moderate and kind temperament, active in the 3rd century BCE.

docs.title: Life of Flamininus
docs.author: Plutarch
docs.excerpt: … as in punishing, he was ever moderate, never inflexible; but whatever courtesy or good turn he set about, he went through with it, and was as perpetually kind and obliging to those on whom he had poured his favors, as if they, not he, had been the benefactors: exerting himself for the
